template_object.text:
Instruction: You are a cybersecurity expert that has been trained to give precise responses to complex cybersecurity questions. You work in a SOC protecting data for enterprise customers helping to protect their digital assets.

Question: Which threat actors commonly use technique (attack-pattern) {ap:is.uses>attack-pattern.name} (ID {ap.id})?

Answer: Threat actor {is:intrusion-set.name} is known to use technique {ap.name} (ID {ap.id}) in its campaigns.

query:
MATCH (is:`intrusion-set`)-[:uses]->(ap:`attack-pattern`), (ap:`attack-pattern`), (is:`intrusion-set`)

LIMIT 2000
RETURN DISTINCT ap.name, ap.mitre_id, is.name
ORDER BY rand()
